projects.project_name: NLP-Based CCPI Predicting System Using Financial Articles
projects.project_details: Preprocessing articles and generating FinBERT embeddings of articles, applied topic modeling to the BERTopic model with tuned UMAP and HDBSCAN, constructed monthly topic-articles probabilities, and predicted the CCPI value using microeconimic data.

projects.project_name: Automated Vehicle Market Data Pipeline using R
projects.project_details: Implemented modular scraping functions, dynamic user-agent rotation, HTTP retry logic, and multi-session parallelization to generate analysis-ready datasets for market analytics.
Developed LSTM and BiLSTM neural network models to classify tweets as positive or negative, and built a Random Forest model achieving 86.68% accuracy.

projects.project_name: Predictive Modeling for Income Classification of Adults in the USA
projects.project_details: Developed an LSTM model to predict future values of multiple variables.

projects.project_name: Stock Price Prediction of Apple Inc.
projects.project_details: Developed a model to predict stock prices.

projects.project_name: Multivariate Data Analysis of Framingham Heart Study Dataset
projects.project_details: Applied principal component analysis, linear discriminant analysis, factor analysis, and K-Means clustering, and identified three principal components and three factors.

Reduced 10K+ high-cardinality categorical labels using LLaMA 8B, applied CatBoost encoding and dimensionality reduction such as UMAP, PCA, Truncated SVD, and compared K-Means, Mini-Batch K-Means, and HDBSCAN cluster algorithms.

Automated report checking tasks, converted PDF reports into OCR-processed raw text, applied preprocessing techniques to noisy OCR raw text outputs, extracted financial data values using LLaMA 8B, and generated structured Excel validation outputs for audit-ready reporting.
